7469767099540311064","book_info":{"abstract":"（西游+佛魔+幕后，后续可能会写宝莲灯）
一觉醒来，空耀懵了，他居然来到了西游世界，门口来了一只前来拜师的猴子
空耀表示自己很慌啊，看着站在自己面前的孙悟空，空耀脑瓜子懵懵的。
现在孙悟空还是一只走路都蹦蹦跳跳的小猴子。
闭关结束后，空耀得知孙悟空被欺负，顿时怒了，真当我方寸山没有人了是吧？
西游路上
空耀百般谋划，要将孙悟空拉出量劫。
车迟国时，孙悟空赌约三赌三输，看着眼前为车迟国三妖撑腰的神秘人
孙悟空：“来着何人，报上名来”
空耀：“我当谁呢？这不是在方寸山偷桃的小猴吗？”
孙悟空：“八戒分行李，这一难过不去了”
准提：“不是哥们，不是说的我佛门大兴吗？怎么我的谋划都没了？”
燃灯：“不知道啊？我被扒的就剩个裤衩子了”
鸿钧：“我好像看到了一道红色的身影，他所散发的气息让吾感到恐惧”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6eb36bec6041e64251fdcc738da72baf","author":"爱旅游的余光","author_id":"","book_id":"7469767099540311064","book_name":"西游：悟空方寸山一别，近来可好","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6891人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7469767122223104536","read_count":"6891","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"562233"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"257","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,洪荒,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o559f18ca1ea2d1ad334d7bbc63bc89cc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440476&x-signature=NxPSnOH1G3j1Ydtr7%2BQE2BQIACQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3408908695645304","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231701169899098083EFC5402F8D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_
